detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use ospi driver.

sect1.title: xospipsv_flash_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XOspiPsv driver directly. This example performs the read and write and erase using ospi driver in polled mode.

sect1.title: xospipsv_flash_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XOspiPsv driver directly. This example performs the read and write and erase test using ospi driver in interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xospipsv_flash_non_blocking_read_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XOspiPsv driver directly. This example performs the read (using non-blocking APIs) and write and erase using ospi driver in polled mode.

sect1.title: xospipsv_flash_config.h
sect1.para: Contains flash related configuration table and macros. This header file must be included in the ospipsv examples.
